item.title: 📝 franklioxygen/v2s (139 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: franklioxygen

📝 Repository: franklioxygen/v2s

📄 Descrizione: Live bilingual subtitles for any app on macOS. Captures audio, transcribes speech, and translates — all from your menu bar.

⭐ Stelle: 139

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: live-captions macos-app offline speech-to-text subtitles swift transcription translate voice-to-text

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-17T17:26:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-02T01:12:23Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 emanuele-em/cove (138 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: emanuele-em

📝 Repository: emanuele-em/cove

📄 Descrizione: An extensible, multi-database GUI client for macOS — add any database by implementing a single Swift protocol. Built for contributors.

⭐ Stelle: 138

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: contributions-welcome database extensible gui hacktoberfest macos open-source swift swiftui

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-02T02:18:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 HMAKT99/UnTouchID (135 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: HMAKT99

📝 Repository: HMAKT99/UnTouchID

📄 Descrizione: Use your phone's fingerprint to authenticate on any Mac — sudo, screensaver, App Store. No $199 Magic Keyboard needed. Works with iPhone, Android, Apple Watch, Wear OS, or any browser. Ready for MacBook Neo.

⭐ Stelle: 135

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: android biometrics kotlin mac-mini macbook macos open-source pam security swift touch-id watchos wear-os

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-27T17:57:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-30T04:42:20Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
